narrative:
Oxford Twp 3 (precinct in Butler County) has 983 registered voters, with 45.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
